title: Test Layers, Service Containers, Coverage, and Changed-Case Evidence · Delivery-System Trace: Ci Test Layer Risk Selection
summary: A green unit suite mocks every boundary, integration tests share mutable state, service containers have no readiness check, and coverage increases while production behavior regresses. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci test layer risk selection increment in layered test and service evidence plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost.
Publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example suite mocks every boundary, starts an unready database, shares state across 6 shards, retries flakes, and celebrates coverage while a changed case fails. Design risk-layered, isolated, diagnostic evidence. Competency probe: Allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost. A defensible solution applies Ci Test Layer Risk Selection, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to layered test and service evidence plan.

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-test-layer-risk-selection — Allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-ci-testing-services-coverage-2
  - competency: ci-worked-ci-testing-services-coverage-2
    artifact: test-evidence.yaml
    decision: worked ci testing services coverage 2
    environment: trusted release tag requiring an environment approval
    fault-injection: route five percent traffic to a revision with a data incompatibility
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked2
    change: |
      layers: [unit, component, integration, contract, e2e, accessibility, security]
      service-image: postgres@sha256:verified
      service-health: readiness-query
      state: per-job-fixture
      shard-proof: complete-and-disjoint
      coverage: branch-changed-line-and-mutation
      retry: disabled-by-default
      reports: immutable-junit-trace-screenshot
    verify: run changed-case tests with fresh service state deterministic seeds report reconciliation and failure preservation
    failure: Reject coverage percentage as assertion quality, start as readiness, shared mutable fixtures, or retry-until-green.
    repair: Select layers by risk, wait for service behavior, isolate state, prove shards, preserve reports, and repair flakes causally.
content.caption: Runnable CI/CD workflow, artifact, release, and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
